title: polypodium costatum
intro: Polypodium costatum, also known as the Chinese polypody, is a species of fern that belongs to the genus Polypodium. It has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antiviral properties. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever, relieving cough and sore throat, and protecting against respiratory infections. In herbal preparations, Polypodium costatum is often used as an ingredient in teas, tinctures, and infusions to support respiratory health and immune function.
